🌤️ TOG 1.0 · All-Season

Custom TOG 1.0 Baby Sleeping Bag

Our best-selling TOG weight — versatile enough for spring, summer nights, and early autumn. The go-to choice for brands that want a single year-round SKU. Available in all three fabric options.

Room Temperature 20–24°C
Min. Order 300 pcs/style
Sample Lead Time 10–15 days
Bulk Lead Time 30–45 days
Request Sample → Get Pricing
🌤️
🌱 GOTS ✅ BSCI 🛡️ EN 16781 OEM/ODM

Ideal Use Cases

  • Year-round bestseller SKU
  • Spring / early autumn collections
  • European & North American markets
  • Starter product for new baby brands

Available Materials

  • Organic cotton interlock (GOTS)
  • Bamboo viscose blend
  • Merino wool fine gauge

Customization Options

  • Custom colors (Pantone matched)
  • All-over & placement prints
  • Embroidered logos & labels
  • 2-way zipper / safety flap
  • Custom sizing & grading
  • Private label & packaging

Standard Size Range

  • Newborn (0–3 months)
  • Small (3–9 months)
  • Medium (9–18 months)
  • Large (18–36 months)
  • Custom sizes on request
